user_already_exists_with_phone_and_role: Mtumiaji aliye na nafasi ya {role} tayari yupo kwa nambari hii ya simu.
name_mismatch: Jina kamili lazima lilandane na akaunti
phone_mismatch: Namba ya simu lazima ilandane na akaunti
unique_constraint: {{field}} hii tayari inatumiwa na akaunti nyingine
pin_min_length: PIN lazima iwe na angalau herufi 4
pin_digits_only: PIN lazima iwe na tarakimu tu
old_pin_min_length: PIN ya zamani lazima iwe na angalau herufi 4
new_pin_min_length: PIN mpya lazima iwe na angalau herufi 4
no_pin_set: Hakuna PIN iliyowekwa. Tafadhali weka PIN kwanza.
welcome_sms: Karibu {{full_name}}! Akaunti yako ni {{account_number}} na nambari ya simu {{phone}}. Neno la siri: {{password}}
welcome_email_message: Hongera! Akaunti yako ya ACCESPAY sasa iko tayari. Unaweza kutumia huduma salama na za haraka.
welcome_email_recommend: Tunapendekeza ubadilishe nenosiri lako mara ya kwanza unapoingia.
welcome_email_support: Timu ya ACCESPAY iko tayari kukusaidia wakati wowote.
profile_update_sms: Habari {full_name}, taarifa zako za wasifu (akaunti {account_number}) zimerekebishwa kwa mafanikio.
password_changed_sms: Nenosiri lako limebadilishwa. Ikiwa hukufanya mabadiliko haya, tafadhali wasiliana na usaidizi mara moja.
